note: Weekly rotators the Bungie API does NOT expose (featured raid pair, featured dungeon pair, Grand Master Nightfall + its reward). These are community-tracked. This table holds EXPLICIT per-week entries keyed by the weekly-reset ISO (Tuesday 17:00 UTC) — no forward extrapolation. Add a week only when its values are verified. Upgrade path: once a verified ordered-list + anchor is available, swap the lookup for modular arithmetic in rotations.js without changing the /weekly contract.
